message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): ARC eviction keys in GC pruning + incremental tests (bd-3t3.10)

Adds pruned_keys (PageNumber, CommitSeq) tracking to PruneResult and
GcTickResult for ARC cache integration (§6.7). Three new tests:
incremental across calls, ARC eviction key correctness, aggregation.
Fixes collapsible_if clippy lint in fsqlite-vfs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
